name: obligatory_ai_generation_comment_compliance
description: Require exact AI generation marker comments in newly created files and classes. Use whenever adding new files or class definitions.

# Obligatory AI Generation Comment Compliance

Use the exact comment text `generated by AI in Github cloud`:
- near the top of each newly created file
- in or directly above each newly created class definition

Keep the text exact for consistency and auditability.
